parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const context = $json.body?.context?.last_booking || null; const contextLine = context && (context.date || context.time || context.service) ? `Previous booking context: ${JSON.stringify(context)}\n` : ""; return { model: $env.DEEPSEEK_MODEL || "deepseek-chat", messages: [ { role: "system", content: "Extract booking intent and call the tool with best-effort structured arguments. Keep date format YYYY-MM-DD and time format HH:mm when available." }, { role: "user", content: `${contextLine}User message: ${$json.body?.message || "I need to book an appointment"}` } ], tool_choice: { type: "function", function: { name: "check_availability" } }, tools: [ { type: "function", function: { name: "check_availability", description: "Parse booking request details", parameters: { type: "object", properties: { action: { type: "string", enum: ["check", "book", "confirm"] }, service: { type: "string" }, date: { type: "string", description: "Preferred date in YYYY-MM-DD" }, time: { type: "string", description: "Preferred time, e.g. 15:00" } } } } } ] }; })() }}
